description_long: This is a large humanoid doll with a cartoonish mouse head, featuring oversized round black ears, a pale face, and exaggerated facial features including large eyes and a small nose. The doll is dressed in a black jacket with a shiny finish, paired with bright red pants that have a loose fit. Its hands and feet are covered, with the hands appearing to be gloved in black and the feet in dark shoes. The overall build is bulky, suggesting a soft, padded construction typical of mascot costumes. The surface appears mostly smooth with some matte and glossy areas, and the doll stands upright in a lifelike pose.
description: A large, cartoonish mouse-headed doll in a black jacket and red pants, with oversized ears and a padded, mascot-like build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, black jacket, red pants, and both hands visible at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the protruding mouse nose, ear profile, and the side seam of the jacket and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, jacket, and pants, with the tail-like extension of the jacket visible.
description_view_3: Right rear three-quarter view showing the back of the head, right side of the jacket, and the shape of the legs.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a black, shiny-finish jacket reminiscent of a bomber or zip-up style, paired with loose-fitting, bright red pants. The outfit is simple and bold, with no visible patterns or logos, evoking a cartoon mascot or streetwear influence.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its arms relaxed at its sides, legs straight and slightly apart, and head facing forward. The posture is static and balanced, typical of a display or mascot figure.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a neutral, slightly smiling expression with wide-open eyes, arched eyebrows, and a small, closed mouth, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance.
attribute_hair_style: The doll has no visible hair, but features a smooth, black mouse head with large, rounded ears characteristic of cartoon mascots.
